privileged_info_summary: Task uses synthetic data created by setup_task.sh. Two Acme Corp customers are created with emails alice@acmecorp.com and bob@acmecorp.com, with conversations titled 'Question about enterprise billing' and 'Feature request: SSO Integration' respectively. The urgent conversation is titled 'System Critical: Database Crash detected' (from charlie@gmail.com). Agent must create two tags: 'Acme VIP' (for Acme Corp conversations) and 'Urgent' (for the critical issue). The task runs in FreeScout, an open-source PHP/Laravel help desk application, with MariaDB 10.11 backend and admin credentials admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123!. Verification checks that both Acme conversations are tagged with 'Acme VIP', the critical conversation is tagged with 'Urgent', and no false positives occur (only these 3 conversations tagged).
